zh.lifeSummary: 當Bouchard de Guise於1133年9月23日出生在法國皮卡迪艾斯吉斯時，他的父親Guy de Guise63歲，母親Countess Adele de Montmorency37歲。他和Adelaide de Roucy至少有1個女兒。他去世於1185年8月5日在法國皮卡迪索姆享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Bouchard de Guise于1133年9月23日出生在法国皮卡迪艾斯吉斯时，他的父亲Guy de Guise63岁，母亲Countess Adele de Montmorency37岁。他和Adelaide de Roucy至少有1个女儿。他去世于1185年8月5日在法国皮卡迪索姆享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Guise
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and French: habitational name from the district of France of this name, in Aisne.
French: from a short form of an ancient Germanic personal name based on the element wid(u) ‘wood, forest’ (see Guy 1).
Americanized form of German   Geiss  .

variants.name: Gise
meanings: English: variant of   Guise  . This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.
Americanized form of German   Geis  .

variants.name: Guy
meanings: English (of Norman origin) and French: from a common Old French personal name Guy, from ancient Germanic Wido, a short form of compound names based on the element wid(u) ‘wood, forest’, Latinized as Guido .
English (of Norman origin): alternatively, an occupational name for a guide, Old French gui (a derivative of gui(d)er ‘to guide’, of ancient Germanic origin).
Altered form of French   Guay  .

nameMeanings.name: Bouchard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Marcel, Andre, Michel, Normand, Pierre, Cecile, Gilles, Lucien, Alphonse, Jacques, Alain.
French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Burchard, composed of the elements burg ‘protection’ and hard ‘hard, strong’.

French: in some cases, possibly also a nickname for someone with a big mouth (in either a literal or figurative sense), from bouche ‘mouth’ + the pejorative suffix -ard. Compare Buschor , Bushard , Bushaw , and Bushor .

variants.name: Bushard
meanings: Americanized form of French   Bouchard  .
Possibly, in some cases, also an Americanized form of German Buschard (see Bushart 2).

variants.name: Buschor
meanings: Swiss German: probably a Germanized form of French   Bouchard  . Compare   Buschur   and   Bushor  .

variants.name: Bushore
meanings: Americanized form of French Bouchard , reflecting the characteristic Canadian and American French rounding of the -ard ending. Compare Bushor .

en.lifeSummary: When Bouchard de Guise was born on 23 September 1133, in Guise, Aisne, Picardie, France, his father, Guy de Guise, was 63 and his mother, Countess Adele de Montmorency, was 37. He had at least 1 daughter with Adelaide de Roucy. He died on 5 August 1185, in Somme, Picardie, France, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Bouchard de Guise est né le 23 septembre 1133, à Guise, Aisne, Picardie, France, son père, Guy de Guise, avait 63 ans et sa mère, Countess Adele de Montmorency, avait 37 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Adelaide de Roucy. Il est décédé le 5 août 1185, à Somme, Picardie, France, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Bouchard de Guise am 23. September 1133 in Guise, Aisne, Picardie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guy de Guise 63 und seine Mutter Countess Adele de Montmorency 37. Er hatte mit Adelaide de Roucy mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 5. August 1185 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Somme, Picardie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Bouchard de Guise è nato il il 23 settembre 1133 nel Guise, Aisne, Picardie, Francia, il suo padre, Guy de Guise, aveva 63 anni e il suo madre, Countess Adele de Montmorency, aveva 37 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Adelaide de Roucy. Morì il 5 agosto 1185, nel Somme, Picardie, Francia, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Bouchard de Guiseが1133年9月23日にフランスピカーディエイスングイゼで生まれた時，父Guy de Guiseは63歳，母Countess Adele de Montmorencyは37歳であった。彼はAdelaide de Roucyとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1185年8月5日にフランスピカーディソンメで51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Bouchard de Guise(이)가 1133년 9월 23일 프랑스 피카디 아이스니 길즈에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guy de Guise(은)는 63세였고, 그의 어머니 Countess Adele de Montmorency(은)는 37세였다. 그는 Adelaide de Roucy(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1185년 8월 5일 프랑스 피카디 솜에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.23 de setembro de 1133–5 de agosto de 11: 1133 оны Есдүгээр сарын 23–1185 оны Наймдугаар сарын 5

pt.23 de setembro de 1133–5 de agosto de 11: 23 de setembro de 1133–5 de agosto de 1185
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Bouchard de Guise nasceu em 23 de setembro de 1133, em Guise, Aisne, Picardie, França, seu pai, Guy de Guise, tinha 63 anos e sua mãe, Countess Adele de Montmorency, tinha 37 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com Adelaide de Roucy. Ele faleceu em 5 de agosto de 1185, em Somme, Picardie, França, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Bouchard de Guise родился 23 сентября 1133 г. в местности гуис, эисн, пикарди, Франция, его отцу по имени Guy de Guise было 63 года, а матери, которую звали Countess Adele de Montmorency, 37. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Adelaide de Roucy. Он умер 5 августа 1185 г. в местности сомм, пикарди, Франция в возрасте 51 год.

es.23 de setembro de 1133–5 de agosto de 11: 23 de septiembre de 1133–5 de agosto de 1185
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Bouchard de Guise nació el 23 de septiembre de 1133, en Guise, Aisne, Picardie, Francia, su papá, Guy de Guise, tenía 63 años y su mamá, Countess Adele de Montmorency, tenía 37 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Adelaide de Roucy. Murió el 5 de agosto de 1185, en Somme, Picardie, Francia, a la edad de 51 años.
